Markdown# Third-Party Licenses

## FreeType

**Library:** FreeType 2 font engine  
**Copyright:** Copyright © 1996–2026 The FreeType Project (www.freetype.org)  
**License:** FreeType License (FTL) — BSD-style with credit clause

Full license: [https://freetype.org/license.html](https://freetype.org/license.html)

- Used for font loading and glyph metrics in UFox Engine.

---

## Google Noto Font Family

**Fonts:** Noto Sans, Noto Serif, Noto Mono, and other Noto fonts (including Roboto where applicable)  
**Copyright:** Copyright 2011 Google Inc. All Rights Reserved.

**License:** SIL Open Font License (OFL) 1.1 for most Noto fonts

### License Details

- Most Noto fonts are licensed under the **SIL Open Font License 1.1**.

Full license links:
- SIL Open Font License: [https://scripts.sil.org/OFL](https://scripts.sil.org/OFL)
- Roboto License: [https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Roboto/license](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Roboto/license)

### Usage in UFox Engine

- Used for UI text rendering.
- Converted to MSDF atlases for rendering.
- No modifications made to the original font files.
- Full compliance with the respective licenses is maintained.
